Transcrição Completa: 8 Graphics Design

 

 

[00:00] "Hey guys. So there's a lot of graphic designers here in the community and a lot of us agency owners, we also just have graphic designers a part of our staff."

 

[00:10] "So certain points, especially revenue generating points, we want to sell the skills of the people that work for us or we might have a strategic referral network where we know some creative agencies that specifically specialize in graphic design."

 

[00:24] "There's plenty of ways that you could apply a graphic design skill into your agency services. You could be revamping landing pages. You could be revamping social media assets. You could be creating content to be posted."

 

[00:37] "Uh you could just be flat out touching up people's per uh personality brands and their businesses, how they look when they're presenting themselves."

 

[00:45] "There's so many different ways that you guys could be using graphic design skills to be getting paid. So, long story short, I'm going to focus on if I'm selling social media as I have some other video pitches specifically for landing pages and funnels and just some other areas where graphic design can be used."

 

[01:03] "I've actually picked out this guy. He's just randomly on Facebook. His name's the the motivation expert. Uh, looks like his his actual name is Jim Cathkart."

 

[01:14] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: Perfil do Facebook de "The Motivation Expert" (Jim Cathkart)

 

NÚMEROS: 3 posts recentes idênticos

 

VISUAL: Screenshot do Facebook mostrando três imagens idênticas consecutivas na timeline, identificação clara de problema de qualidade de design

 

[01:16] "And the reason I picked him, if if you can see here on my screen, uh, he's got the exact same image three times as his most recent three shared photos."

 

[01:25] "So, that is a great identifier. All these different people out there that just flat out, I mean, they they use fiverr.com, you know, they might use uh freelancers that are just, you know, poor in their ability to produce quality work."

 

[01:39] "There are so many people out there with very low-level skills. And there's also a lot of people who are just undereducated on what to do online and how to leverage all the different graphic design content that can be created."

 

[01:52] "So, long story short, this is my video pitch to uh to Jim here as if I were you and what I would do to be pitching him. So, without further ado, here we go."

 

[02:02] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: Início do Video Pitch

 

NÚMEROS: N/A

 

VISUAL: Transição para demonstração de pitch real, tela preparada para apresentação

 

[02:04] "Hey Jim, what's going on? My name is Jeremy. You likely have no clue who I am. I actually run a creative agency. We specialize in graphic design. We're going to focus on your social media right now."

 

[02:17] "What we're going to talk about is going to make you more money. It's going to drive you more leads. It's going to make you look better. It's just overall going to position your brand."

 

[02:26] "This is no fluff. There's no BS in what I'm talking about. Uh we generate results for people time and time again just by increasing the quality of how they're presenting themselves online through better graphic design."

 

[02:38] "Let's face it, there's a lot of people out there that you can hire that are contractors or that you can outsource to nowadays, especially on websites like fiverr.com and and freelancer.com."

 

[02:49] "But the tough part about that, Jim, I'm sure you know this being a speaker, you know, how many people you think you're presenting to here in front of this? A couple hundred maybe."

 

[03:00] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: Foto de Jim palestrando

 

NÚMEROS: Algumas centenas de pessoas (estimativa de audiência)

 

VISUAL: Screenshot de Jim em apresentação ao vivo, usado para criar conexão e demonstrar compreensão do seu trabalho

 

[03:02] "You don't have time to manage these people. And on top of that, it's tough to have a conversation like you would in real life with people who are on the internet."

 

[03:11] "So, without further ado, I want to introduce my agency. What we do, we provide a point of contact for you, that can speak English fluently, that can work with you, that can understand your goals, that can take all the existing assets that you already have out there."

 

[03:28] "Uh, including your your photos, uh, your personal photos, your business photos, the location photos of your business. If you have anything where you're helping people or uh just any kind of photo that we can use that's at least quality and high definition, we can incorporate this into into so many different graphic design projects."

 

[03:47] "And it looks like what you do, you're a motivational leader and sales speaker. That's great. And how to think Chinese or think American. So these two different services that you offer here in addition to a few more."

 

[04:00] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: Descrição dos serviços de Jim no perfil

 

NÚMEROS: 2+ serviços principais identificados

 

VISUAL: Screenshot destacando os serviços oferecidos por Jim, demonstração de pesquisa prévia

 

[04:02] "The reason that I'm making this video for you is because I noticed the three most recent photos you share are the exact same thing but with different tips inside of them."

 

[04:12] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: Posts repetitivos de "Daily Sales Tip"

 

NÚMEROS: 3 posts idênticos consecutivos

 

VISUAL: Três imagens idênticas do livro com diferentes textos, links não clicáveis dentro das imagens, design amador

 

[04:14] "So, as an example of what we do, we create content for people and we make it look awesome. We work with one of these guys, uh his name's Jeremy Haynes, and he does all kinds of cool stuff."

 

[04:25] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: Portfólio - Jeremy Haynes

 

NÚMEROS: N/A

 

VISUAL: Screenshot do Facebook de Jeremy Haynes mostrando design profissional, múltiplas imagens de alta qualidade, branding consistente

 

[04:27] "Some of the examples of our work, if you just go to his Facebook page or uh you go to some of his websites, all these all these little images here, they're made by us and they make the guy look awesome, right?"

 

[04:38] "So, what we want to do for you, as an example, with your daily sales tip, which looks like it could go on and on and on and on and on, instead of just posting the book and what looks like hyperlinks in an image where you can't even click it cuz it's Facebook and you know, just it's a little unprofessional."

 

[04:57] "I'm sure that you're getting great results with it though, Jim."

 

[05:00] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Comentário - Técnica de Não Criticar"

 

NÚMEROS: N/A

 

VISUAL: Pausa explicativa sobre importância de elogiar mesmo ao apontar problemas

 

[05:02] "And right here, you'd want to make sure you don't criticize. You want to make sure that you still are fluffing them up a little bit, right?"

 

[05:09] "So Jim, not to criticize you, but you know, if I click on your photo, I can't actually click on the link that it looks like is a link inside of the photo, you know, and that that lowers the overall engagement."

 

[05:22] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: Análise de Engajamento dos Posts

 

NÚMEROS: 2 likes (post 1), 2 likes (post 2), 3 likes (post 3), 1 like (post 4), postado dia 24, analisado dia 27

 

VISUAL: Screenshots dos posts mostrando métricas baixas de engajamento, datas visíveis, problema quantificado

 

[05:24] "I mean, per per post, you know, this is posted on the 24th. It's the 27th right now. You got two likes, you got two likes on the next one, three likes on the next one, one like on the next one."

 

[05:34] "So, we want to increase the amount of social engagement that you're getting. And I want to be clear, we're not just selling you on likes, comments, and shares."

 

[05:42] "We're selling you on a better positioned brand that's gonna that's going to generate more leads and drive you more sales because that's what the big brands do. The big brands have great graphic design."

 

[05:53] "So, here's how it works, Jim. We can create one piece of content per day. So, 30 pieces of content just like this. It could just be your sales tip."

 

[06:03] "Uh we can make cool content like that Gary Vee guy has where we we add some stuff at the top and the bottom of the videos that you're producing."

 

[06:11] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: Referência a Gary Vaynerchuk

 

NÚMEROS: N/A

 

VISUAL: Menção a estilo de branded video content, overlays de texto em vídeos

 

[06:13] "Uh and also, we're a social media marketing agency. So besides just doing graphic design, we could be posting this stuff for you."

 

[06:20] "So we could take cool photos of you, turn you black and white, uh create some image quotes, we could pull quotes right out of your book. Uh there's so many cool things that we could do."

 

[06:31] "Another guy, like I was talking about that that Jeremy Haynes guy, uh he has some cool stuff that we've done for him. If you go to his Instagram and scroll down to the bottom here, uh image quotes are a fantastic way to get different points from your book out there in the form of an image."

 

[06:47] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: Instagram de Jeremy Haynes - Image Quotes

 

NÚMEROS: N/A

 

VISUAL: Feed do Instagram mostrando quotes profissionalmente desenhadas, branding consistente, fotos variadas e de alta qualidade

 

[06:49] "So this is an example right here. Luck, a matter of preparation, meeting opportunity. You know, we put the guy's logo here. We take a nice photo that matches the brand, right?"

 

[07:01] "We don't just take random photos or the same photo again and again and again and again. That's what we avoid. And I'm sure Jim, you're getting a great cost here."

 

[07:11] "But here's this. We only cost $3,000 a month to produce 30 days worth of images and to post them. Okay?"

 

[07:19] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Estrutura de Precificação - Pacote Base"

 

NÚMEROS: $3,000/mês, 30 posts (1 por dia)

 

VISUAL: Primeira oferta de preço, pacote básico de serviços

 

[07:21] "If you want two images a day created, no problem. That just doubles up the work. But we don't double up the cost. We only charge $5,000 for 60 posts and we'll happily post those for you on Instagram. We'll post them on Facebook. We'll post them on Twitter."

 

[07:38] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Estrutura de Precificação - Pacote Premium"

 

NÚMEROS: $5,000/mês, 60 posts (2 por dia)

 

VISUAL: Segundo tier de preço, demonstração de valor (não dobra o preço ao dobrar o trabalho)

 

[07:40] "And we have no problem if you'd like as well for an extra 2,000 bucks a month to distribute that content."

 

[07:47] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Add-on: Distribuição de Conteúdo"

 

NÚMEROS: +$2,000/mês adicional

 

VISUAL: Serviço complementar de paid advertising e distribuição

 

[07:49] "So, when we talk about distribution, that means that we become your advertiser as well as your graphic design agency. And we actually take what we post and we make sure that it gets more than one to two likes."

 

[08:02] "We make sure that we actually get you reach uh and we of course make sure that those people become people that we can sell."

 

[08:10] "Facebook gives us all these tools where we can retarget social interaction nowadays. So besides just positioning your brand better, you know, Jim, you should never share a website that cuts you off right here at the nose."

 

[08:24] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: Post com imagem cortada inadequadamente

 

NÚMEROS: N/A

 

VISUAL: Screenshot mostrando erro de cropping onde o rosto está cortado na altura do nariz, exemplo de falta de profissionalismo

 

[08:26] "We want to be responsible for increasing the level of professionalism that you operate at, increasing the quality of your brand, increasing the effectiveness of your message and your ability to get your points out there."

 

[08:39] "And in addition to that, we want to make you look like the man."

 

[08:43] "If there's anything that we can do for you to help your current team, uh, to help your staff, we do consulting as well."

 

[08:50] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Opção de Consulting"

 

NÚMEROS: $5,000 (one-time)

 

VISUAL: Terceira opção de serviço - transferência de conhecimento ao invés de hands-on

 

[08:52] "So, for 5K, if you want us to come into your business, if you want us to explain these processes, if you want us to to skill transfer and knowledge transfer, what we know how to do operationally as a graphic design creative agency, we have no problem in doing so to make sure that you and your team have a crystal clear perspective on what to do."

 

[09:13] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: Exemplo de trabalho avançado - Photoshop

 

NÚMEROS: N/A

 

VISUAL: Imagem de Jeremy Haynes na praia "segurando" um sign, demonstração de capacidades avançadas de edição

 

[09:15] "You know, for this photo right here, would you believe me if I told you Jeremy didn't even have a sign held up and that we were able to photoshop him looking like he was holding this on the beach here?"

 

[09:26] "He was physically on the beach standing, but he was not holding up this big sign."

 

[09:31] "Anyway, Jim, we just want to make sure that your message gets out there. Uh once again, just to be clear, for 3K a month, we're going to create one piece of content a day, which is 30 days worth of content, and we're going to post it on all your social accounts, including LinkedIn, Facebook, Instagram, Twitter."

 

[09:49] "And whether you have a large audience there or not, just like everybody else who has a large audience, they had to start somewhere and they had to start posting high-quality stuff to get the attention they have. So, we want to be responsible for that."

 

[10:03] "If you want us to post two pieces of content a day, which doubles your opportunity to get people aware of who you are, it doubles the amount of messages that you're putting out there per day. We would love to do that as well."

 

[10:16] "We're not going to double the cost though if we do that. We're only going to charge you 5K."

 

[10:21] "And like I said, if you don't want us to do anything hands-on ourselves, you already have a team. You already have somebody who's doing this. Well, they need to step it up."

 

[10:31] "And we want to make sure that you and that person have our skills and our knowledge transferred into you guys so you guys can carry on the operations that we would have hands-on."

 

[10:41] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: Informações de Contato

 

NÚMEROS: N/A

 

VISUAL: Tela final com detalhes de contato na descrição do vídeo

 

[10:43] "Our contact information is right here in the description and we look forward to helping you out. Thanks for your time, Jim. I'll be talking to you soon. Bye."

 

[10:52] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: Retorno à Análise do Instrutor

 

NÚMEROS: N/A

 

VISUAL: Fim do pitch, retorno ao modo explicativo

 

[10:54] "And that's it. All right. See you in the next video, guys."

 

 

📊 RESUMO EXECUTIVO

 

NÚMEROS PRINCIPAIS:

 

Métricas de Problema Identificado:

3 posts consecutivos com imagem idêntica

2 likes por post (média baixa)

3 dias entre postagem e análise (24 a 27)

1-3 likes por post individual

Algumas centenas de pessoas em audiência de palestras

 

Estrutura de Precificação:

Pacote Base: $3,000/mês (30 posts, 1 por dia)

Pacote Premium: $5,000/mês (60 posts, 2 por dia)

Add-on Distribuição: +$2,000/mês

Consulting One-Time: $5,000

 

Volume de Entrega:

30 peças de conteúdo/mês (pacote base)

60 peças de conteúdo/mês (pacote premium)

Postagem em 4+ plataformas (LinkedIn, Facebook, Instagram, Twitter)

 

ESTRATÉGIAS E SISTEMAS:

 

Identificação de Prospects:

Buscar perfis com posts repetitivos/idênticos

Identificar qualidade baixa de design (Fiverr, freelancers baratos)

Procurar pessoas com mensagem forte mas apresentação fraca

Palestrantes e personalidades públicas sem equipe de design

 

Estrutura do Pitch:

Identificação do problema específico (3 imagens idênticas)

Empatia com tempo limitado do prospect

Diferenciação (ponto de contato que fala inglês fluentemente)

Showcase de portfólio (Jeremy Haynes)

Análise quantitativa de engajamento atual

Demonstração de capacidades técnicas

Apresentação de 3 tiers de serviço

Fechamento com opções claras

 

Técnicas de Comunicação:

Nunca criticar diretamente ("I'm sure you're getting great results")

Elogiar antes de apontar problemas

Usar exemplos visuais de clientes reais

Quantificar problemas com dados (likes, datas)

Oferecer múltiplas opções de engajamento

Demonstrar expertise técnica (Photoshop avançado)

 

Serviços Oferecidos:

Criação de conteúdo gráfico diário

Image quotes extraídas de livros/conteúdo

Video overlays (estilo Gary Vee)

Tratamento de fotos (preto e branco, edição)

Posting em múltiplas plataformas

Distribuição paga (retargeting de interações sociais)

Consulting e transferência de conhecimento

 

Aplicações de Design:

Revamp de landing pages

Assets de redes sociais

Conteúdo para postagem regular

Branding de personalidade

Edição avançada (Photoshop de elementos)

Branded video content

 

ESTRUTURA:

 

Framework de Venda de Design:

Identificação: Encontrar problema visual óbvio

Pesquisa: Entender serviços e audiência do prospect

Demonstração: Mostrar portfólio relevante

Quantificação: Provar problema com métricas

Solução: Apresentar pacotes escalonados

Prova Social: Usar exemplos de clientes atuais

Flexibilidade: Oferecer opções (hands-on vs consulting)

 

Modelo de Negócio:

Retainer mensal recorrente

Escalabilidade através de tiers

Upsell de distribuição como add-on

Alternativa de consulting para prospects com equipe

 

Plataformas Cobertas:

Facebook

Instagram

Twitter

LinkedIn

 

Tipos de Conteúdo Criado:

Daily tips/posts

Image quotes

Video overlays

Branded photography

Social media graphics

Promotional materials

 

DADOS FINANCEIROS:

 

Estrutura de Receita Mensal:

Tier 1: $3,000/mês (30 posts)

Tier 2: $5,000/mês (60 posts)

Add-on: +$2,000/mês (distribuição)

Máximo MRR por cliente: $7,000/mês (Tier 2 + Distribuição)

 

Receita One-Time:

Consulting/Knowledge Transfer: $5,000

 

Proposta de Valor:

Não dobrar preço ao dobrar trabalho (de $3K para $5K, não $6K)

Posting incluído no preço base

Múltiplas plataformas sem custo adicional

Ponto de contato dedicado que fala inglês fluentemente

 

ROI para Cliente:

Aumento de engajamento (de 1-3 likes para números significativos)

Mais leads através de melhor posicionamento

Profissionalização de marca

Capacidade de retargeting de interações sociais

Omnipresença em múltiplas plataformas

 

Comparação Competitiva:

Alternativa superior a Fiverr/Freelancer

Comunicação em inglês fluente

Gestão de projeto incluída

Consistência de qualidade

Conhecimento estratégico, não apenas execução

 

 

DURAÇÃO: ~11 minutos FORMATO: Screencast educacional com demonstração de pitch real para serviços de design gráfico (análise de perfil do Facebook de Jim Cathkart)
